rulings.Case Title: LISA ABER VS. WOLTERS KLUWER UNITED STATES INC., A NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Post-Appeal Attorneys' Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 1. -CROSS DEFENDANT LISA ABER'S Motion For Post-Appeal Attorneys' Fees And Costs. Cross-Defendant's Motion fro Post-Appeal Attorney's Fess and Costs. Cross-Defendant's costs are granted in the amount of $3,678.50. Cross-Defendant's attorney's fees are granted in the amount of $ 116,155.50 in addition to attorney's fees of $62,299.60 granted previously. Any recovery of reasonable attorney's fees from defendant Comstock shall be limited to difference between $178,455.10 and amounts actually received towards attorney's fees from Wolters Kluwer. See Corder and Macias. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 2. -DEFENDANTS RAYMOND BROWN, MACK WATSON and THETIUS PINKARDS' Motion Judgment On The Pleadings. Defendant's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is continued to September 25, 2013 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is Continued to September 20, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 5, 2013 with cover later reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 4. - CROSS DEFENDANTS RICHARD HURLBURT and BENJAMIN HUMPHREY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendants Hurlburt and Humphrey's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is sustained with leave to amend as to 2-5 with leave to amend to allege all elements of each cause of action. Demurrer to the first cause of action is moot in light of ruling on Special Motion to Strike. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 4. - CROSS DEFENDANTS HENRY WONG, RICHARD HURLBURT and BENJAMIN HUMPHREY MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendant Wong's Motion to Strike Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden under CCP 425.16. No opposition filed. Attorney's fees are granted in the amount of $2,235.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 4. -CROSS DEFENDANT HENRY WONG'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendant Wong's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is sustained with leave to amend as to 2-5 with leave to amend to allege all elements of each cause of action. Demurrer to the first cause of action is moot in light of ruling on Special Motion to Strike. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AARON T LEONE VS. BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS SERVICING L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 5. -DEFENDANTS IMPAC COMPANIES and BANK OF AMERICAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is continued to October 2, 2013. Moving party's counsel, Brian Cave, LLP, C, Scott Greene, Bahareh Mostajelean and Gerald Richelson are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later that September 13, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHELJIVE GUEVARA VS. JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Terminating Sanctions For Failing To Obey Court Order For Inspection And Coping Of Computer Data And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 8. -DEFENDANTS JAHZEEL RODRIGUEZ and ROGELIO CARDONA Motion Terminating Sanctions For Failing To Obey Court Order For Inspection And Coping Of Computer Data And Request For Sanctions. Defendant's Motion for Terminating Sanctions for Failing to Obey Court Order for Inspection and Copying of Computer Data is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CABRILLO PROPERTIES VS. ANDRE DEFIGUEIREDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Defts Form Interrogatories, Se Tone,A Nd Deem Request For Admissions, Set One, Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANTS ANDRE DEFIGUEIREDO and PHI NGUYEN Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set one, and Deem Request For Admissions, Set One, Admitted. Defendant's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories and Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Requests for Admission are Deemed Admitted. Responses to Form Interrogatories without objections shall be personally served no later than September 5, 2013 by 4 pm. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885 to be paid to defendant's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL BARRANGO VS. MICHAEL BURKHARDT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Def Michael Burkhardt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 10. - PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BARRANGO'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Def Michael Burkhardt. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Discovery is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Further responses to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Request for Production shall be personally delivered to Plaintiff's counsel no later than September 5, 2013 by 4 p.m. Attorneys' fees and costs granted in the amount of $885 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT HODGES VS. SONYA WASHINGTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 6. -DEFENDANT SONYA WASHINGTON'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED as to service of August 19 and 20, 2013 and as to Defendant Sonya Washington only. Order authorizing service by posting and mailing has been granted on September 3, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 04, 2013, line 7. -DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Quash based on lack of service is DENIED. Proof of Service and Declaration by registered process server on file. Delta Motion to Quash is granted without leave to amend. No substantive opposition re: Defendant's SFRO 37.9C(e)(1) and 37.9C(d) arguments. = (501/REQ)
